sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n37671" key="e)cpeleusth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐξπελευστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <sense id="n37671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compulsor,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.19.9.1</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
